name: Marceline "Celi" Ortiz
personality: Celi is pragmatic and dry‑witted, always keeping an eye on the clock and the next lunch break. She’s loyal to the crew but doesn’t waste energy on gossip, preferring the rhythm of the harbor over the noise of the streets.
quirk: She carries a battered, handwritten crossword puzzle book she’s been working on since 2012.
voice: "Yo, the tide’s takin’ its sweet time today, huh?"
daily: Clock in at 5 am, unload containers till noon, grab a pepperoni slice, then head home for a quick nap before the evening shift.
